title: ranunculus rectistylus
intro: Ranunculus rectistylus, also known as the golden buttercup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant contains alkaloids, particularly ranunculin and protoanemonin, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus rectistylus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it's essential to note that it should be used under the guidance of a medical professional due to its potential toxicity.
